description_long: This is a modern pendant lamp fixture featuring five individual hanging light bulbs, each suspended from a black circular ceiling mount by long, thin black cords. The cords are arranged in a slightly irregular, draped pattern, with each bulb hanging at an equal length and spaced evenly apart. The bulbs are housed in simple cylindrical black sockets, giving the fixture a minimalist and industrial aesthetic. The central ceiling mount is accompanied by four smaller mounting points, which help distribute the cords and stabilize the fixture. The bulbs themselves are exposed, with no shades or diffusers, emphasizing a raw, utilitarian style. This lamp is designed to provide broad, ambient illumination and serves as a striking visual element in contemporary urban interiors.
description: A modern, industrial-style pendant lamp with five exposed bulbs suspended from a black circular ceiling mount by draped cords. The fixture features minimalist cylindrical sockets and an open, geometric arrangement.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing all five bulbs evenly spaced and the draped cords connecting to the central and peripheral ceiling mounts.
description_view_1: Side angle highlighting the vertical drop of the cords and the cylindrical sockets, with the bulbs aligned in a row.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the symmetrical arrangement of bulbs and the central ceiling mount.
description_view_3: Opposite side angle, again emphasizing the vertical suspension and the geometric layout of the cords and bulbs.
